_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of age and neurofibromatosis type 1 status on white matter integrity in the optic radiations.

_contextSnippet: This analysis identified significant (P < .05) reductions in FA and increases in RD and MD among NF1 participants diffusely throughout the white matter skeleton...the interaction term NF1*ln(age) for all DTI measures (FA, RD, and MD) was significant in nearly all regions
details: Identified significant (P < 0.05) reductions in FA and increases in RD and MD among NF1 participants diffusely throughout the white matter skeleton, with significant NF1*ln(age) interaction terms in nearly all regions
